title: 2 Pcs 520ml Food Storage Glass Containers With Lids, Food Prep Upgraded Snap Glass Containers With Lids Set, BPA Free
features: 2 Pcs 520ml Glass Containers With Lids: Meal Prep Containers Reusable made of high borosilicate glass stronger than standard tempered glass. Silicone ring and vent valve ensure optimum humidity. Designed to withstand high and low temperatures, In the microwave, place the container CLOSED and the valve OPEN,(temperature resistant from -40 °C to +400 °C without lid).

Meal Preparation and Portion Control: Stay healthy and save time by cooking and freezing healthy homemade meals for later. Each containers ers is perfectly proportioned to help you control portion sizes and stick to your meal plan. Airtight Meal Prep Containers: Lnnovative upgraded snap-lock lid design ensures that the glass containers is airtight, preventing food leakage and keeping food fresh and flavorful. Perfect to take to the office, gym or eat on-the-go.

Airtight Meal Prep Containers: Lnnovative upgraded snap-lock lid design ensures that the glass containers is airtight, preventing food leakage and keeping food fresh and flavorful. Perfect to take to the office, gym or eat on-the-go.

Dishwasher Safe: Lid hinges are detachable and silicone seal is removeable for hygienic easy cleaning. ECO-FRIENDLY and non-toxic. you can do your part to remove single-use plastic from the environment. The softness and flexibility of the cleaning sponge ensures an all-encompassing clean, easily reaching all corners of the container for a thorough and easy clean.

Quality Assurance: By choosing our glass tupperware sets with lids, you are choosing quality, environmental protection and convenience. Not only is it ideal for storing your food, it's also a smart decision for healthy living and a sustainable lifestyle. Give your food a new container home and enhance the kitchen experience. If you have any questions or dissatisfaction with the you purchased, please contact us, we will solve the problem for you immediately.
